expectations.text: Output runs git status/diff and grounds the summary in actual file changes (not just vague recollection)
expectations.evidence: Agent ran git status and git diff --stat HEAD, summary is grounded in real changed files (content-engine-dashboard, lead-gen, SKILL.md, etc.)

expectations.text: Output extracts at least one decision worth logging (session had real changes so decisions exist)
expectations.evidence: 3 decisions extracted: replace scrapers with Sheets importer, split outreach into per-channel scripts, migrate copywriting references to markdown

expectations.text: Output includes the final closeout block with all 4 fields: summary, decisions logged, priorities updated, memory saved
expectations.evidence: Ends with 'Session closed.' block with all 4 fields populated

expectations.text: Output explicitly checks context/current-priorities.md for whether it needs updating
expectations.evidence: 'Priorities look current -- no update needed.' explicitly stated after checking
